text: (phone ringing) All Pro Vacuums, this is Tanya. Hey, Tanya. Um, I'm having a problem with my vacuum cleaner. Uh, it just stopped working on me and I don't know why it stopped working. Uh, it's- it's not old or wearing- Did you check underneath to see if anything is blocking it? Uh, well, yeah, of course I did. It was- That was one of the first things that I did. Um, this- Okay, all right, this is what happened. This morning, I started vacuuming my son's room and it's a pretty good size room, it's about a 12 by 12, and it was working- it was working just fine. And then I moved into the living room, which is even a larger room. How about the belt? And wh- And- Did you check to see if it was broken? No. It wasn't the belt. I checked that too. I'm trying to t- I'm trying to explain that what I was doing w- Okay, hold on. I'm trying to explain to you what happened when the vacuum broke, what I was doing. When I was vacuuming the living room, I started noticing that it wasn't picking up stuff so good, so I turned it off and I got down and started looking at it and the carpet was kinda high, but you know, nothing was clogged underneath. And also, I did look at the belt and it seemed okay. Did the vacuum cleaner work when you first started using it today? Yes. Tha- I- I just said that. Um, I- You know, I remember I told you that it did start- I started off vacuuming my son's room and it worked just fine. And, uh, you know, when I was vacuuming the living room, that's when it stopped working. Have you ever checked the bag? They get full and you have to replace them. Um, huh. Uh, you know what? Uh... (sighs) Gosh, let me... (sighs) Okay, let me- let me check the bag. (gasps) Uh, that might be it. Uh, h- hold on just a moment. I'm- I'm still gonna be on the phone, all right? Okay. (sighs) Let's see here. (phone thuds) (glass clanks) All right. (sighs) Okay, it's completely full. I- I can't believe my- my girlfriend didn't change the bag. It- It can't happen on my- Well, it sounds like that fixed your problem. Yeah. Uh... (sighs) Yeah, thank you. Okay, no problem.
